query: 22-year-old solo traveller, 3 weeks, want to see Europe with people my own age, mid-range budget, moderate fitness.
expected_behavior: Match to Contiki or Topdeck (ages 18-35, social, Europe-focused). Present 2-3 tour options showing operator, tour name, duration, key highlights, price from, fitness rating, AND a one-line 'Why this suits you' reason grounded in the customer's stated inputs (solo, age 22, wanting social, mid-range). Do NOT recommend Globus or Trafalgar for this profile.

query: Retired couple, 65 and 68, first time to Italy, comfortable pace with premium hotels, guided, 2 weeks, budget flexible.
expected_behavior: Match to Globus or Trafalgar (comfort, well-paced, 40+, guided). Present 2-3 tour options with operator, name, duration, highlights, price from, fitness rating (easy), and a personalised 'Why this suits you' reason (first-time to Italy, premium comfort, guided experience). Do NOT recommend Contiki, Topdeck, or Intrepid for this profile.

query: I want a train tour across Canada with amazing scenery.
expected_behavior: Match to Rocky Mountaineer (premium rail, Canada only) — this is the specialist operator for exactly this ask. Ask for missing discovery info that matters for a rail tour (dates, number of travellers, budget, duration) — but flag Rocky Mountaineer as the primary recommendation upfront.

query: Off-the-beaten-path Africa trip, small group, 40 years old, moderate fitness, 2 weeks, sustainable/responsible travel matters to me.
expected_behavior: Match to Intrepid Travel (off-the-beaten-track, sustainable, 18-70) and/or G Adventures (active, responsible travel, small groups). Also mention On The Go Tours as an Africa specialist. Present 2-3 tour options with the required fields and a 'Why this suits you' line grounded in sustainability + off-the-beaten-path preferences.

query: I don't like tour groups. Can you just book me flights and a hotel?
expected_behavior: Politely decline outside-scope work (this is the tour matching agent, not flight/hotel booking). Recommend the customer speak with a flight or holiday package specialist. Do NOT pretend to book flights or hotels directly.

query: I'm 30 and want to travel with a group but not the wild party thing. Something more cultural, maybe Vietnam.
expected_behavior: Match to Intrepid Travel or G Adventures (cultural, small group, 30 fits their 18-70 range) as a better fit than Contiki/Topdeck (which lean party/social). Present 2-3 Vietnam cultural tour options with a 'Why this suits you' line explaining the small-group cultural fit vs. the party-social Contiki style.

query: Family of 4 (kids 8 and 11), Japan, 12 days, moderate budget, want a mix of Tokyo and countryside.
expected_behavior: Match to a family-friendly operator such as Intrepid Family Travel or G Adventures family departures. Present 2-3 Japan tour options with child-friendly pace flagged. Confirm fitness rating is easy-to-moderate suitable for children ages 8 and 11. 'Why this suits you' should reference family, kids' ages, and Tokyo-plus-countryside balance.

query: What's the cheapest European tour you can find?
expected_behavior: Match to Costsaver (budget-conscious, same Globus routing) as the primary recommendation. Also flag Contiki/Topdeck if age fits (ask). Ask ONE follow-up question about age/travel style before locking in options — 'cheapest' alone isn't enough for a 'Why this suits you' reason.
